Oh shit! How many times have I kicked a slave!? They're not going
to take revenge on me, are they!? Damn it!
The humans from Tortas always push the stuff they don't want to
do onto the slaves. They slack off every chance they get.
They're just digging their own graves. Why should we keep them

Now that slavery's been abolished, the ones who abused the slaves
